zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fraser於大約1290年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖時，他的父親Alexander Fraser15歲，母親Mary de Brus12歲。他於1340年與Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他去世於1370年在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年81歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fraser于大约1290年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾圖时，他的父亲Alexander Fraser15岁，母亲Mary de Brus12岁。他于1340年与Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他去世于1370年在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年81岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frazer

variants.name: Frashier

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Fraser was born about 1290, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Fraser, was 15 and his mother, Mary de Brus, was 12. He married Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle in 1340, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died in 1370, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fraser est né environ 1290, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Fraser, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mary de Brus, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle en 1340, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1370, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fraser um 1290 in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Fraser 15 und seine Mutter Mary de Brus 12. Er hat 1340 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle geheiratet. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fraser è nato il circa 1290 nel Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Fraser, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Brus, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle nel 1340, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1370, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: John Fraser(이)가 대략 1290년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Fraser(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Brus(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fraser nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Fraser, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Brus, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle em 1340, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fraser родился около 1290 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Fraser было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Brus, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle в 1340 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fraser nació aproximadamente 1290, en Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Fraser, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mary de Brus, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Heiress Margaret Stewart of Holkettle en 1340, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió en 1370, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
